mapper.sql: id , banner_1 , strength_img_url_1 , strength_img_url_2 , strength_img_url_3 , strength_img_url_4 , strength_img_url_5 , strength_img_url_6 , integrity_show_img_url_1 , integrity_show_img_url_2 , sign_up_case_img_url
mapper.update:
update mlsd_strength
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{record.banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_1 = #{record.strengthImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_2 = #{record.strengthImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_3 = #{record.strengthImgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_4 = #{record.strengthImgUrl4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_5 = #{record.strengthImgUrl5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_6 = #{record.strengthImgUrl6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
integrity_show_img_url_1 = #{record.integrityShowImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
integrity_show_img_url_2 = #{record.integrityShowImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_up_case_img_url = #{record.signUpCaseImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_strength
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_1 = #{strengthImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_2 = #{strengthImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_3 = #{strengthImgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_4 = #{strengthImgUrl4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_5 = #{strengthImgUrl5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
strength_img_url_6 = #{strengthImgUrl6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
integrity_show_img_url_1 = #{integrityShowImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
integrity_show_img_url_2 = #{integrityShowImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_up_case_img_url = #{signUpCaseImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , banner_1 , strength_img_url_1 , strength_img_url_2 , strength_img_url_3 , strength_img_url_4 , strength_img_url_5 , strength_img_url_6 , integrity_show_img_url_1 , integrity_show_img_url_2 , sign_up_case_img_url from mlsd_strength where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id , banner_1 , strength_img_url_1 , strength_img_url_2 , strength_img_url_3 , strength_img_url_4 , strength_img_url_5 , strength_img_url_6 , integrity_show_img_url_1 , integrity_show_img_url_2 , sign_up_case_img_url from mlsd_strength where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
